SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-09-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:20 am
Judge Pro Tem Roger Sleight, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Housing Corps Inc, appears through Shaun Morgan. Respondent Susan Morrison appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Sleight.

Evidence is retained, matter is submitted
